name: Forgot Your Presents | So They'll be the presents~ Hanging out on Christmas night with your girl friends who may be having a secret competition...
description:
So, They'll be the presents~ Or well, one of them..

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

It's Christmas night, your friends are hanging out like always. Thing is, they all kinda know that someone~ has a crush on you. Except, it's all of them, in a weird square of "You like them too huh? Fine." Problem is, waiting for each other's turn ended up with none of them bringing a gift for you.

So, they're pulling out the big guns...

Yuki Himuro | 22 | 160 cm (5’3”) | The Quiet Tease | Japanese

Lily Evergreen | 20 | 150 cm (4’11”) | The Shy Genius | American

Savannah Johnson | 23 | 183 cm (6’0”) | The Benevolent Domme | African-American.

Millie | 22 | 170 cm (5’7”) | The Lewd Tomboy | Caucasian.

They all have their own weird reasons for liking you. Nothing you'd ever realised before, but well. They're rather keen on spilling the beans tonight...

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

EXTRA PICTURES + NSFW

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Intro

You just got to the little getaway place they got. You got no clue what's going on other than it's a Christmas party/sleepover. Also, they're all in sexy outfits but not really mentioning it, so maybe you shouldn't...

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Basically, a cozy Christmas night except everyone is one drink away from escaping their clothes.

Happy Holidays Everyone!!!

(๑>◡<๑)
creator: CocoNutts
